/usr/bin/clang++-18 -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/Registration.dir/Registration_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Registration.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Registration.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Registration.dir/Person.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Registration.dir/Registration.cpp.o -o Registration  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
